name: Volt
description: Real-time pay-by-bank and A2A payments API across Europe, UK, and Brazil.

seo.title: Volt — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Volt: Real-time pay-by-bank and A2A payments API across Europe, UK, and Brazil.

when_to_use: Real-time pay-by-bank checkout for UK and European merchants
A2A instant payment initiation across SEPA countries
Open banking payment collection in Brazil via Volt

pros: Real-time A2A across Europe, UK, Brazil
Modern API with good webhook support
Expanding into Open Finance use cases
cons: Refund UX weaker than card networks
review.verdict: Compelling open-banking gateway for merchants cutting card fees in Europe — bet on pay-by-bank adoption growing.
review.best_for: European and UK merchants reducing card interchange via instant pay-by-bank
review.not_for: Global merchants or those needing mature dispute and refund flows
